description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a slightly slanted shed roof and a clean, minimalist facade. The front features a small, fenced garden area with a low hedge, a tree, and two green trash bins near a white gate. Large windows dominate the upper and lower floors, providing ample natural light, while the side yard includes a bicycle and additional fencing. The rear and side elevations are mostly plain, with minimal window openings and a focus on geometric simplicity. The exterior is primarily finished in white and light gray, with a dark gray roof and subtle landscaping details. The overall design emphasizes functionality and contemporary urban living.
description: A modern two-story house with a slanted roof, large windows, and a small fenced garden in front. The exterior is white and gray with minimalist landscaping and urban features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, a small fenced garden, a tree, and two green trash bins.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the house, the hedge, and the garden area extending along the side.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a visible bicycle in a small fenced area and a large window on the upper floor.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain wall with minimal windows and the continuation of the hedge and garden.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows on the front facade
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with a small white gate, no porch, and a low hedge bordering a compact garden
